stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at FL370 when the pilot suddenly starts feeling a slight discomfort in the ear and a “popping” sensation. After checking the cabin pressure gauge and confirming there is a pressurisation system failure, what should the pilots do immediately?

options.b: Donning oxygen masks is only required for rapid decompression
options.c: Initiate descent, inform ATC and don oxygen mask.
options.d: Descend as rapidly as possible to reach an altitude with sufficient oxygen partial pressure.
